items.title: Solana bets on AI agents: Foundation says network is becoming core infrastructure for ‘agentic’ internet
items.whyYouShouldCare: Solana's focus on AI agents positions it as a key player in the evolving internet landscape, potentially enhancing its infrastructure relevance and attracting new developers.

items.title: Solana Foundation Launches Solana Developer Platform
items.whyYouShouldCare: The launch of the Solana Developer Platform aims to streamline development, which could boost ecosystem growth and increase overall network usage.

items.title: Solana’s Builder Debate: What the Foundation Says It Offers
items.whyYouShouldCare: The Foundation's insights into its offerings highlight its commitment to supporting builders, which may strengthen community engagement and innovation on the Solana network.
